School Days.name: Time Travel Calendar
School Days.overview: Students draw a 'Time Travel' calendar on paper, note the days 'yesterday,' 'today,' and 'tomorrow,' and draw an activity for each day.
School Days.general_objective: Develop understanding of past, present, and future time concepts.
School Days.technology_integration: Use a simple calendar app to track days and events.

School Days.name: Weekly Story Journal
School Days.overview: Students write short journal entries about the weather in their diaries (e.g., 'It is rainy today.' 'It was sunny yesterday.' 'It was cloudy on Tuesday.').
School Days.general_objective: Develop writing skills and time/weather vocabulary integration.
specific_objectives: Use past and present tense correctly
School Days.technology_integration: Create digital diary entries with calendar integration.

School Days.name: Digital Time Diary
School Days.overview: Students learn to create a digital diary by using a simple calendar app or filling in calendar areas on a digital diary worksheet to track activities and events for yesterday and today.
School Days.general_objective: Develop digital literacy and time tracking skills.
School Days.technology_integration: Use digital diary apps with calendar features.

School Life Adventures.name: My Classroom Object Hunt
School Life Adventures.overview: Students go on a classroom object hunt, labeling objects with descriptive words like 'big,' 'small,' or colors, and create a mini-poster.
School Life Adventures.general_objective: Develop descriptive vocabulary and observation skills.
School Life Adventures.technology_integration: Use cellphone or tablet camera to take pictures and label objects digitally.

School Life Adventures.name: Classroom Object Bingo
School Life Adventures.overview: Students play a game of bingo. The teacher describes classroom objects (e.g., 'small brown bag'), and students mark the correct object on their bingo cards.
School Life Adventures.general_objective: Develop listening comprehension and descriptive language recognition.
School Life Adventures.technology_integration: Create digital bingo game with audio descriptions.

School Life Adventures.name: Digital Object Hunt
School Life Adventures.overview: Students use cell phones or tablets to take pictures of classroom objects, label them with adjectives, and create a digital poster.
School Life Adventures.general_objective: Develop technology skills and digital presentation abilities.
School Life Adventures.technology_integration: Create digital poster with photos and text labels.

All About the Weather.name: Weather Journal
All About the Weather.overview: Children create a weather journal, drawing daily weather conditions (e.g., sunny, rainy) and describing their favorite weather.
All About the Weather.general_objective: Develop consistent observation habits and weather vocabulary.
All About the Weather.technology_integration: Use a weather app to track daily weather conditions.

All About the Weather.name: Weather Forecast Video
All About the Weather.overview: Students act as weather reporters, recording short videos describing the day's weather and their favorite weather using phrases like 'I like sunny days.'
All About the Weather.general_objective: Develop presentation skills and weather vocabulary in context.
All About the Weather.technology_integration: Record and edit weather forecast videos.

All About the Weather.name: Digital Weather Tracking
All About the Weather.overview: Students use a weather app to track daily weather conditions and create a digital weather report.
All About the Weather.general_objective: Develop digital research skills and data presentation.
specific_objectives: Use weather app for data collection
All About the Weather.technology_integration: Use weather apps and digital chart tools.

All About My Body.name: Body & Clothes Matching Game
All About My Body.overview: Students create a matching game with cards showing body parts and clothes (e.g., 'head' with 'hat') and play the game in groups.
All About My Body.general_objective: Develop body and clothing vocabulary through interactive play.
specific_objectives: Match body parts with appropriate clothing
All About My Body.technology_integration: Use online matching game platform for digital version.

All About My Body.name: Body Part Puppet Show
All About My Body.overview: Students create a storybook about puppets and the type of clothes they want them to wear, using descriptive sentences like 'The teddy bear wears a hat on his head.'
All About My Body.general_objective: Develop storytelling skills and descriptive language.

All About My Body.name: Digital Body Quiz
All About My Body.overview: Students create an interactive body part quiz using a simple online quiz-making tool.
All About My Body.general_objective: Develop digital creation skills and body vocabulary reinforcement.

Exploring My Community.name: Community Map
Exploring My Community.overview: Students create a community map labeling important places like 'the park' or 'the market' and drawing routes to explore them.
Exploring My Community.general_objective: Develop spatial awareness and community vocabulary.
Exploring My Community.technology_integration: Use online map tool to create and label simple community map.

Exploring My Community.name: Community Place Scavenger Hunt
Exploring My Community.overview: Students participate in a scavenger hunt around the classroom, identifying places in the community and matching them to descriptions (e.g., 'It's the market.').
Exploring My Community.general_objective: Develop observation skills and community place recognition.
Exploring My Community.technology_integration: Use tablets for photo documentation during hunt.

Exploring My Community.name: Digital Community Tour
Exploring My Community.overview: Students create a digital tour of their community with photos on a cell phone or by using pictures found or taken by the teacher, describing places with sentences like 'This is the park.'
Exploring My Community.general_objective: Develop digital presentation skills and community awareness.

Discovering Nature's Wonders.name: Rainforest Animal Profiles
Discovering Nature's Wonders.overview: Children review research simplified for learners by the teacher to understand different rainforest animals. With that information, students will create a profile for each animal with descriptions and images.
Discovering Nature's Wonders.general_objective: Develop research skills and animal vocabulary.
Discovering Nature's Wonders.technology_integration: Use tablet to research animals and create digital profiles.

Discovering Nature's Wonders.name: Nature Storybook
Discovering Nature's Wonders.overview: Students create a storybook about animals they find in the rainforest, using descriptive sentences like 'The sloth is slow and furry.'
Discovering Nature's Wonders.general_objective: Develop creative writing and descriptive language skills.
Discovering Nature's Wonders.technology_integration: Create digital storybook with images and text.

Discovering Nature's Wonders.name: Digital Animal Cards
Discovering Nature's Wonders.overview: Students use a digital tool, with assistance from the teacher, to create animal flashcards; they label the animals and describe them with adjectives like 'big jaguar' or 'slow sloth'.
Discovering Nature's Wonders.general_objective: Develop digital creation skills and descriptive vocabulary.

Fun Outdoors!.name: Outdoor Sports Journal
Fun Outdoors!.overview: Students create a journal to record outdoor activities they enjoy (e.g., 'swimming' or 'running'), using action verbs to describe their experiences.
Fun Outdoors!.general_objective: Develop writing skills and sports vocabulary.
Fun Outdoors!.technology_integration: Use fitness app to track outdoor activities.

Fun Outdoors!.name: Digital Sports Day
Fun Outdoors!.overview: Students create a short video or draw a comic strip panel about their favorite outdoor activity (e.g., swimming or running), and describe it using sentences like 'I love to run.'
Fun Outdoors!.general_objective: Develop media creation skills and personal expression.

Fun Outdoors!.name: Fitness Tracking App
Fun Outdoors!.overview: Students use a fitness tracking app to monitor their outdoor activities and describe their progress in simple sentences.
Fun Outdoors!.general_objective: Develop technology skills and health awareness.
Fun Outdoors!.technology_integration: Use fitness apps for activity tracking and reporting.

It's Festival Season.name: Festival Celebration Poster
It's Festival Season.overview: Students create a poster describing their favorite festival activities, including food and fun, using simple sentences and illustrations.
It's Festival Season.general_objective: Develop cultural awareness and descriptive language.
It's Festival Season.technology_integration: Use digital poster-making tool for design.

It's Festival Season.name: Festival Storybook
It's Festival Season.overview: Students create a storybook about their favorite festival, describing activities and food using general phrases like 'I like the fireworks.' or 'I love the food.'
It's Festival Season.general_objective: Develop storytelling skills and cultural expression.

It's Festival Season.name: Festival Photo Story
It's Festival Season.overview: The teacher collects photos of local festivals and prints for students. In groups, students organize the images into a story collage they can present and describe to others.
It's Festival Season.general_objective: Develop visual storytelling and presentation skills.
It's Festival Season.technology_integration: Create digital photo story with captions.
